## Scientific contract changed

Describe the arithmetic, packing, protocol, or packaging contract affected by this change.

## Validation

- [ ] `./reproduce.sh verify`
- [ ] `./reproduce.sh build`
- [ ] Relevant full N=10 or N=100 reproduction
- [ ] No frozen asset or expected metric was silently changed
- [ ] Security claims remain consistent with `security_claim=0`

## Evidence

Provide compact machine-readable summaries. Do not commit raw logs, build directories, or private data.
